description: Full-stack intelligence suite for Java/Angular mono-repos: graph analysis, FRD generation, persona reviews, Playwright test generation, and gap detection.

skills.name: repo-graph-architect
skills.description: Scan mono-repo, build hierarchical dependency graph, emit repo-graph.json + interactive HTML visualiser.

skills.name: graph-intelligence-suite
skills.description: Three agents consuming repo-graph.json: Q&A, FRD generation, API performance analysis.

skills.name: functional-spec-generator
skills.description: Generate a 10-section non-technical FRD from Java/Angular code. Graph-accelerated when repo-graph.json is present.

skills.name: persona-suite
skills.description: Five expert personas: Product Owner, Business Analyst, Technical Architect, Developer, Test Architect.

skills.name: playwright-test-generator
skills.description: Generate full Playwright test suites: Angular UI tests (Page Object Model) + Java API tests.

skills.name: gap-detector
skills.description: Four-engine gap detector: functional, technical, scenario (production-breaking), and performance gaps.
